problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
